title: sphaerostylis malaccensis
intro: Sphaerostylis malaccensis, also known as the Malayan dodonea or Malay dodonea, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sphaerostylis malaccensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by boiling its leaves and stems in water to make a tea for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in folk medicine to make topical preparations for skin and wound care.
